name: RPlog_Meeting_with_Tyler_on_Etti_IV
title: A Meeting with Tyler on Etti IV
summary: At the darkened Imperial Embassy on Etti IV, the smuggler-pilot Axel Vichten seeks an audience with the Sith Lord Darth Malign to propose a strike against the rival Maffi organization. Bluffing his way past the guards, Axel lays out a plan for a rapid orbital and ground assault on the Maffi compound near Ord Mantell, drawing on his strengths as a combat pilot. Malign, lurking hooded in the shadows, counsels caution, escape plans, and careful timing, and floats the idea of using his ship the Predator as a diversion. The two scheming men reach a tentative understanding, with Axel departing to gather intelligence and ensure the Maffi suffer at least financial harm.
